title: Contriving Imaginary Gaps in Nuclear Deterrence

title: New Glenn rocket explodes on Cape Canaveral pad
description:
A Blue Origin New Glenn rocket exploded on its launch pad at Cape Canaveral, Florida, during a May 28 hotfire test, destroying the rocket and causing extensive pad damage.
The post New Glenn rocket explodes on Cape Canaveral pad appeared first on SpaceNews.

title: GIC, Temasek anchor Singapore’s investment in Anthropic’s $65B Series H round
description: Singapore's two sovereign wealth funds, GIC and Temasek, have joined a landmark $65 billion Series H funding round for Anthropic, the AI safety company behind the Claude family of models, valuing the firm at $965 billion post-money.

title: Blue Origin’s New Glenn rocket explodes during testing in Florida
description: The explosion is likely a major setback for Jeff Bezos' spaceflight company, and its attempt to compete with SpaceX.

title: DIU ups Hermeus contract for high-speed drone
description: A recent award from the Defense Innovation Unit raises a total contract ceiling to $219 million, and will further develop Hermeus’ Quarterhorse drone to release payloads at speeds “up to and including Mach 3,” CEO Zach Shore told Breaking Defense.

title: Einride L4 autonomous electric semi truck gets real – in Ohio
description:

title: When Refusal Doesn’t Matter: Operation Epic Fury and the Erosion of Host Nation Consent
description: When the U.S. military launched its war against Iran in Feb. 2026, it did not just dismantle Iranian military capabilities. It shattered the illusion that the United States would consult with its closest allies and that an ally’s refusal to grant base access can stop an American war in motion.
